hosting_renew_period_description: Select the desired automatic renewal frequency.
hosting_renew_period_noPeriodsAvailable: No renewal period is available for this service.
hosting_renew_period_loadError: Unable to load the available renewal periods.
hosting_renew_period_noPeriodHint: Warning, your service will not be renewed automatically. You will need to renew it manually before it expires.
hosting_renew_period_successToast: The renewal period has been successfully updated.
